title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BAYAKBAKIN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TORRIJOS,   PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 536 / 55 OG No. 21, 3823 (May 25, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2148, April 24, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BAYAKBAKIN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TORRIJOS, PROVINCE OF MARINDUQUE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Bayakbakin in the Municipality of Torrijos, Province of Marinduque, is converted into a barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Bayakbakin.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 24, 1959.
